description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 102.

Heroic Path: Titan

Prerequisite: A Strength score of 20 or higher Tier I: Overwhelming Might

Titanic Force. When you make an unarmed strike or an attack with a melee weapon you are proficient with, you ignore resistance to its damage type. Your critical range is increased by 1 for attacks that use Strength.

Displacing Strikes. When you hit a creature with a melee attack and that creature has a Strength score lower than yours, you can choose to knock the creature prone or push the creature 15 feet away. You can push the creature another 15 feet away for each size category smaller compared to you.

Heroic Perk: Unmatched Strength

Prerequisite: Overwhelming Might

Your Strength score increases by 2. 30 is your new maximum for that score. You always have advantage on Strength saving throws, ability checks, and contests. Your carrying capacity is multiplied by 10, and you can momentarily drag, push, pull, or carry impossible weights–structures, ships, or crumbling mountainsides– with a successful Athletics check with a DC at DM’s discretion.

Tier II: Giant’s Wrath

Prerequisite: Unmatched Strength

Shockwave. When you hit a creature with a melee attack, your attack sends a shockwave in a 15-foot radius sphere centered on the target. Each creature in that area other than you, including the target creature, must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw with a DC equal to 8 + your Strength modifier + your proficiency bonus or take half the damage of the original attack as thunder damage. The additional damage of the shockwave cannot exceed 50.

Unmovable. You cannot be knocked prone, shoved, or grappled by creatures with a lower Strength score than you. Heroic Perk: Siege Monster

Prerequisite: Giant’s Wrath

Your attacks deal triple damage to objects and structures. Tier III: Titan

Prerequisite: Siege Monster

Mythic Strength. Your Strength score increases by 4. 34 is your new maximum for that score. Your size category is increased by one, up to a maximum of Huge.

Breaker. When you hit a creature that has 100 hit points or less with a melee attack, they must succeed on

a Constitution saving throw with a DC equal to half the damage dealt by the attack or be reduced to 0 hit points.

Death Grip. You can grapple a creature with your bonus action. You can grapple creatures of any size. When you successfully grapple a creature that has a Constitution score of 19 or lower, you can use an action to reduce the creature to 0 hit points.

Path Connections Unbreakable. Instead of the Unmatched Strength Heroic Perk, you can take the Iron Stance Perk, changing to the Unbreakable path.

Warlord. Instead of the Siege Monster Heroic Perk, you can take the Perfect Body Perk, changing to the Warlord path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
